hypotheses.statement: Next Shorts in discoveries, wildlife should outperform cold topics.
science_clue is the strongest current story shape.
A clearer one-line follow CTA should improve subscribers per 1k views.
birds, cats should only run with stronger hooks or remakes.
Turn top performers into sourced sequence/remake candidates before cold discovery.
Favor frame profile close_subject|feed_bright|high_contrast for stronger click and retention signals.

next_variants.title: The first star compas cue explains beetles' payoff
The first stripe camouflage cue explains tigers' payoff
The first learned habit cue explains monkeys' payoff
The first rock layer cue explains rocks' payoff
The first pattern cue explains crystals' payoff

comment_prompts: Answer this viewer question: Watch the pattern again. Tomorrow in Discovery Brief: another nature signal. Would you trust this explanation from footage alone?
Answer this viewer question: Watch the pride plan again. Tomorrow in Watch The Cue: another animal signal. Is this adaptation, instinct, or intelligence?

visual_policy.rule: Favor the winning visual profile when available; otherwise keep selecting the highest local CTR score while collecting samples.

production_policy.selection_rule: highest autonomy_priority among non-rejected publish_score candidates
